query: SELECT id, name, title, email, contactTrustTier, company, enrichmentStatus FROM contacts WHERE name IN ('Diego Linares', 'Troy Morris', 'John Sinagra', 'Paul Holland', 'Sam Leszczynski', 'Olga Machrone', 'Giuseppe Gulisano', 'Abe Ninan', 'Grant Hudson', 'Choi JungIn', 'Seth Strumph') LIMIT 15;
